skillTree.localised_description: Experienced warriors of Albion sometimes dodge missiles with seemingly unnatural reflexes, gained from the experience of countless skirmishes.
The primitive, often savage-looking talismans of the Albionites still seem to have some protective effects.
A deep rune‑chant hums through the ley‑lines, echoing across the wilds and drawing the roaming centaur herds to gather for war.

effects.description:
Upkeep: -10% for all Centaur units
	(Hero's army)

Recruitment cost: -10% for all Centaur units
	(Hero's army)

Recruit rank: +2 for all Centaur units
	(Hero's army)

skillTree.localised_description: Who wants to live forever? As it turns out, most beings wouldn't say no…

effects.description: When normally killed in action, this Hero will be wounded instead

skillTree.localised_description: Having learned much in their long years of service, this character now turns their attention to training others.

effects.description: Character will share +15% of experience earned between all other active Heroes of the same type
Character will share +30% of experience earned between all other active Heroes of the same type
Character will share +50% of experience earned between all other active Heroes of the same type

skillTree.localised_name: Ogham Fragment of the Great Truth
skillTree.localised_description: Inscribed with signs known to Truthsayers and Ogham-Wardens alone, upon this fragment are written the words of the Great Truth of the Old Ones.

effects.description:
Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +3
	(Hero's army)

attributes.bullet_text: This unit frightens all enemy units, reducing their leadership when nearby. It is also immune to fear. Fear penalties do not stack.
This unit can deploy outside the deployment zone.
This unit can hide in forests until enemy units get too close.
This unit provides a leadership bonus to nearby allies. Units within range of both the Lord's aura and an encouraging unit will receive the larger of the two bonuses.

enabled_if: Winds of magic power is 15 or greater
Leadership is higher than 50% of base

skillTree.localised_description: The edicts of the Great Truth instruct the Ogham-Warden and his charges with clarity, steadying sword-arms in defense of Albion and the Old Ones’ design.
The final decree of the Great Truth’s Ogham stone protects those who defend the world, redirecting any projectile, worldly or arcane, back to the enemies of Albion.

ui_effects.localised_text: Redirects projectiles back towards the firing unit

skillTree.localised_description: An Ogham Fragment bearing the cunning and tenacity of Carnuos the Horned-God, lord of the hunt and father of the Centaurs.

effects.description:
Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +3
	(Hero's army)

Leadership is higher than 50% of base

skillTree.localised_description: The second signs of Carnuos awakens the fury of Carnuos in the Ogham-Warden and his followers, filling their enemies with a mortal dread of the Horned-God's Wild Hunt.
At full mastery of the fragment of Carnuos, Ogham-Warden calls upon the allied beasts of the Horned-God, summoning one of Albion’s Great Gryphons, a mighty and savage defender sent by the Wild God.
This Ogham fragment bears the mark, wisdom and power of Ishernos, two-faced god-goddess of Life and Land.

effects.description:
Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +3
	(Hero's army)

Leadership is higher than 50% of base

skillTree.localised_description: With deeper understanding of Ishernos' fragment, the Ogham-Warden awakens the vigour gifts of Ishernos in his followers, steadying the breath and hardening resolve like ancient bark and stone in those under their charge.

At its full awakening, the fragment of Ishernos it brings forth the retribution of the Earthmother, the very land, root and earth, comes to the defense of the defenders of the world… and to punish those defiling the land.
Magical waystone fragment bearing the mark and legends of Choteich of the Long-Arm, hero-deity and Sun God of Albion.

effects.description:
Winds of Magic power reserve capacity: +3
	(Hero's army)

skillTree.localised_description: Inscribed in the ogham, Choteich's feats in defence of Albion kindle the radiant Ward of Choteich, a protective light that shields the brave warrior from the indignity of far away damage.

attributes.bullet_text: This unit can block projectiles regardless of its facing.

skillTree.localised_description: When Choteich's power is fully drawn forth from the Ogham, it shines as the Wrath of the Long-Arm, a mighty deflagration of solar power smiting the enemies of the Hero-God .

ui_effects.localised_text: Explosion does not affect friendly troops

skillTree.localised_description: If you can swing, slash, stab, gouge, or shoot it, this warrior has mastered every aspect of its use.
Some creatures charge home with such fury that the very ground shakes beneath their feet.
Hand-to-hand combat is a lethal match of cut and thrust. However, it’s not all about offensive strikes; parries and other defensive moves can also win the day.
This warrior is one with their blade; it is an extension of their will, making them a worthy foe in combat.
The iron will and indomitable presence of this leader ensures their followers remain steadfast when facing peril.
The Ogham-Warden bellows a powerful and ancient battlecry, rallying the defenders of the Albion and the world, filling nearby allies with stubborn courage and the will to keep fighting.
A blade that sings in defence will not let its wielder be penetrated.
What the enemy cannot see, it cannot hit. What the enemy cannot see, it cannot survive.
Such is their power and ferocity, a wound-maker will ravage the foe, cutting and pulverising until there is only one exit - death.
Full-Plate armour protects the wearer from head-to-foot. Many such suits are blessed or imbued with arcane abilities.
The bigger they are, the harder they fall.

attributes.bullet_text: The unit is immune to psychological attacks (Fear & Terror).

skillTree.localised_description: The great axe is favoured by wardens who meet desecrators head-on, trusting in bronze, muscle and momentum to break the enemy line.

skillTree.localised_description: Each sweeping strike of the Ogham-Warden carries the wrath of the Centaur, the old memory of rain, red mud and slaughter inspiring impetuous power and strength of arm..

When the might of the Plains of Battle takes hold, the Ogham-Warden unleashes the spirit of the great stampede, causing him and his allies to crash into the foe in a murderous storm of bronze and fury.

attributes.bullet_text: Entities with this attribute double their charge bonus when attacking the rear or flank of an entity.

skillTree.localised_description: Some Ogham-Wardens prefer to strike from afar, bringing down trespassers before hoof and antler ever need meet them in the mire.

skillTree.localised_description: Long years spent guarding Albion's hidden forest groves makethe Ogham-Warden a veteran watcher of the woods, patient and deadly, inspiring greater aim in his ranged allies.

The cunning hunter prepares for any eventuality. The resourcefulness of the Ogham-Warden as a hunter and watcher means that he often carries more than enough projectiles to supply those who favour the bow or sling under his charge.
Those in the army can find succour or be replenished by the power of this champion.

effects.description: Replenish Troops action: Replenishment rate is increased by an additional 3%
Replenish Troops action: Replenishment rate is increased by an additional 6%
Replenish Troops action: Replenishment rate is increased by an additional 9%

skillTree.localised_description: The locals take notice and will be inspired or frightened into action.

skillTree.localised_description: They cannot stop what they cannot see.

effects.description: Damage Walls action: 1 additional wall breaches
Damage Walls action: 2 additional wall breaches

skillTree.localised_description: A skilled assassin is a cold-hearted killer and merciless murderer.
To sow discord and confuse the enemy, sending them down the wrong route or befuddling their senses.

backgroundSkills.localised_description: Self-important and opinionated, this one's hubris knows no end.

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can block projectiles regardless of its facing.
The unit is immune to psychological attacks (Fear & Terror).

backgroundSkills.localised_description: Self-effacing and unpresuming, he believes that we all have a part to play in the Great Plan, one way or another.

attributes.bullet_text: The unit is immune to psychological attacks (Fear & Terror).

backgroundSkills.localised_description: "What are you even for? You're not part of the Great Plan, like all your kind."
"The Plan is the Plan. We shall not deviate or retreat from its path."

backgroundSkills.localised_description: Being fleet of foot is useful in a fight… or when trying to get away afterwards!

backgroundSkills.localised_description: Deceit is a perfectly acceptable means of attack.

backgroundSkills.localised_description: Always in control, this one leaves no stone unturned and nothing to chance.
Although actually reading minds is not in their skillset, this one has extraordinary insight into the motives of others.

effects.description: Magic item drop chance from battle: +15%

backgroundSkills.localised_description: If you're gonna die, you may as well die with your boots on.
Rugged, resistant, and almost unbreakable, this being can and will take on all comers.
What this being doesn't know probably isn't worth knowing, so deep is their interest in the world and its ways.

effects.description: Magic item drop chance from battle: +15%

backgroundSkills.localised_description: Sharp minds make sharp blades sharper still.

effects.description: Hero self-defence: +5% chance of wounding aggressors
